title: Minister urges youths to harness AI, robotics for economic transformation
description: Youth Development Minister, Ayodele Olawande Wisdom, has urged Nigerian youths to take advantage of emerging opportunities in AI and robotics

title: Wall St opens higher as Middle East peace hopes, AI optimism boost sentiment
description: Wall Street's main indexes opened higher on Wednesday, extending their strong run on hopes of a potential U.S.-Iran peace agreement and sustained enthusiasm around artificial intelligence.

title: Innocent Hearts, under Disha – An initiative, Empower Students with AI & Future Skills Workshop

title: PH, Israel deepen ties on minerals, AI
description: DTI's Rodolfo and Israel's Bar Tal meet to advance AI and mineral processing under the US-led Pax Silica alliance.
